---
title: "Groundwater Markets"
subtitle: "Developing a stochastic game model for groundwater markets in California."
author: "John Robin Inston"
date: "2026-02-12"
date-modified: "2026-02-12"
toc: true
title-block-banner: true
categories: [Groundwater, Financial Markets, Stochastic Games, Research, Current]
listing:
- id: posts
  contents:
    - "../../../posts/*/index.qmd"
  include:
    categories: [Groundwater]
  sort: date desc
  type: default
  grid-columns: 4
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, image, date, description]
  max-items: 4
  image-height: "200"
---

## Information

On this page you can find information about my contribution to the project
jointly lead by [Prof. Mike Ludkovski](https://ludkovski.pstat.ucsb.edu) (UC
Santa Barbara) and [Igor Cialenco](https://www.iit.edu/directory/people/igor-cialenco) 
(Illinois Institute of Technology) modelling groundwater markets as 
finite agent stochastic games.  

## Publications

1.  [Short Communication: A Groundwater Market Model](https://epubs.siam.org/doi/full/10.1137/25M1727758); Mike Ludkovski, Igor Cialenco; SIAM Journal on Financial Mathematics, 2025; [DOI: 10.1137/25M1689206](https://doi.org/10.1137/25M1727758).

## Related Posts

::: {#posts}
:::

[See all &rarr;](../posts){.about-links .subtitle}
